title: Grant Thornton India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Grant Thornton India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
